title: Using the Module-Lattice-Based Key Encapsulation Mechanism

group-parts.group: Using the Module-Lattice-Based Key Encapsulation Mechanism
group-parts.name: overview
group-parts.prose:
The effective security strength of ML-KEM has a complex dependency on numerous parameters with different effective security strengths targeted by different standardised parameter sets. The ML-KEM standard contains three different parameter sets: ML-KEM-512, ML-KEM-768 and ML-KEM-1024. The use of ML-KEM-768 and ML-KEM-1024 are approved.

For interoperability and maintainability reasons, ML-KEM-768 will not be approved beyond 2030.
